commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
You are a senior Cloudflare Workers and TypeScript architect.

I already have a complete React + Vite frontend UI for Opendrap DevOps AI. The frontend is currently static. Your task is to convert the platform into a fully dynamic SaaS application using Cloudflare's ecosystem.

IMPORTANT REQUIREMENTS

* Use TypeScript everywhere.
* Backend must use Cloudflare Workers.
* Database must use Cloudflare D1.
* Realtime communication must use Durable Objects and WebSockets.
* Storage must support Backblaze B2 integration.
* Authentication must support Email, Google, and GitHub.
* Architecture must be production-ready.
* Follow clean architecture and scalable folder structure.
* Generate complete code, APIs, database schema, services, repositories, and examples.

TECH STACK

Frontend:

* React
* Vite
* TypeScript
* Tailwind
* shadcn/ui

Backend:

* Cloudflare Workers
* TypeScript

Database:

* Cloudflare D1

Realtime:

* Durable Objects
* WebSockets

Storage:

* Backblaze B2

AI:

* GLM-4.7 Flash

Agent:

* Python Agent

---

PHASE 1

Create backend architecture.

Generate:

src/
├── routes/
├── controllers/
├── services/
├── repositories/
├── middleware/
├── utils/
├── websocket/
├── durable-objects/
├── types/
├── validators/
├── ai/
├── auth/
└── index.ts

Create complete project structure.

---

PHASE 2

Create D1 database schema.

Tables:

users
companies
connections
connection_requests
projects
project_members
deployments
agent_sessions
tasks
task_comments
bugs
bug_comments
chats
chat_members
messages
notifications
activity_logs
api_collections
ai_test_runs
error_logs

Generate:

* SQL schema
* indexes
* relationships
* migrations

---

PHASE 3

Authentication system.

Features:

* Register
* Login
* Logout
* Refresh Token
* Email Login
* Google OAuth
* GitHub OAuth

Generate:

POST /auth/register
POST /auth/login
POST /auth/logout
GET /auth/me

JWT authentication.

Create middleware.

---

PHASE 4

User system.

Features:

* User profile
* Update profile
* Upload avatar
* Skills
* Experience
* Company

Endpoints:

GET /users
GET /users/:id
PATCH /users/:id
DELETE /users/:id

---

PHASE 5

Global Search.

Search by:

* Username
* Company
* Skills
* Projects

Endpoint:

GET /search?q=

Return:

Users
Companies
Projects

---

PHASE 6

Connection System.

Features:

* Send Request
* Accept Request
* Reject Request
* Remove Connection

Endpoints:

POST /connections/request
POST /connections/accept
POST /connections/reject
DELETE /connections/:id

---

PHASE 7

Company System.

Features:

* Create company
* Update company
* Join company
* Leave company
* View members

Endpoints:

POST /companies
GET /companies
GET /companies/:id

---

PHASE 8

Project System.

Features:

* Create Project
* Update Project
* Delete Project
* Invite Members
* Remove Members

Endpoints:

POST /projects
GET /projects
GET /projects/:id
PATCH /projects/:id
DELETE /projects/:id

---

PHASE 9

Realtime Chat.

Use Durable Objects.

Features:

* Private chat
* Group chat
* Project chat

WebSocket Architecture:

User
→ Worker
→ Durable Object
→ WebSocket

Generate:

Chat Durable Object
Message Service
Realtime Events

---

PHASE 10

Task Management.

Kanban board.

Statuses:

Todo
In Progress
Testing
Done

Endpoints:

POST /tasks
GET /tasks
PATCH /tasks/:id
DELETE /tasks/:id

---

PHASE 11

Bug Tracking.

Features:

* Create bug
* Assign bug
* Update status
* Upload screenshot
* Upload video

Statuses:

Open
In Progress
Testing
Fixed
Closed

Endpoints:

POST /bugs
GET /bugs
PATCH /bugs/:id

---

PHASE 12

Agent Communication.

Python Agent connects through WebSocket.

Agent functions:

* Heartbeat
* Git Clone
* Git Pull
* Branch Switch
* Run Command
* Stream Logs
* Upload Results

Generate:

Agent Durable Object
Agent Service
Command Queue

Events:

agent_connected
agent_disconnected
log_received
command_completed

---

PHASE 13

Terminal System.

Create browser terminal.

Flow:

Frontend
→ Worker
→ Durable Object
→ Agent

Generate:

Terminal Session Manager
Terminal Events
Command Streaming

---

PHASE 14

Deployments.

Features:

* Repository connection
* Deployment history
* Branch management
* Deployment status

Endpoints:

POST /deployments
GET /deployments

---

PHASE 15

Cloudflare Tunnel Integration.

Store:

* Tunnel URL
* Status
* Last Seen

Endpoints:

POST /tunnel/start
POST /tunnel/stop
GET /tunnel/status

---

PHASE 16

Logs and Monitoring.

Features:

* Live logs
* Search logs
* Filter logs
* Error tracking

Endpoints:

GET /logs
GET /errors

---

PHASE 17

AI Testing.

Integrate GLM-4.7 Flash.

Features:

* Analyze logs
* Analyze screenshots
* Generate bug summary
* Generate test cases

Endpoints:

POST /ai/analyze-log
POST /ai/analyze-bug
POST /ai/generate-tests

---

PHASE 18

Playwright Testing.

Features:

* Run website test
* Capture screenshots
* Record video
* Store reports

Endpoints:

POST /tests/run
GET /tests/:id

---

PHASE 19

Notifications.

Realtime notifications using Durable Objects.

Events:

Connection Request
Task Assigned
Bug Assigned
Project Invite
Deployment Complete
AI Test Complete

---

PHASE 20

Generate complete API documentation.

For every endpoint provide:

* Route
* Method
* Request Body
* Validation
* Response
* Error Handling
* TypeScript Types
* Example Requests

Generate production-ready code and implement one module completely before moving to the next module.
